message:
test(harness): conformance matrix E2E across 5 terminal emulator profiles (bd-3fc.2)

9 tests covering widget rendering across xterm-256color, screen-256color,
kitty, alacritty, and WezTerm profiles. Matrix: 8 widgets × 5 emulators ×
2 sizes. Validates determinism (CFM-1), no-panic (CFM-2), modern-profile
identity (CFM-3), cross-profile comparison (CFM-4), checksum stability
(CFM-5), JSONL schema (CFM-6), color depth axis, unicode axis, and
per-emulator pass rate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
